narrative:
Mecca Twp Only township has 1,615 registered voters, with 56.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Republican lean of 2.4 percentage points.
